La Manga del Mar Menor · Spain

Penthouse
Puerto Mar

Elevate your Spanish escape at Penthouse Puerto Mar. Perched between the tranquil Mar Menor and the vibrant Mediterranean, our penthouse is designed for those who seek both relaxation and adventure. Spend your mornings paddleboarding on the lagoon, and your evenings hosting private dinners on your exclusive 70m² Sky Terrace. With room for six and views that never end, this isn’t just a place to stay—it’s your private gateway to the best of the Costa Cálida.

Request a Stay Discover More

The Penthouse

Life above
the sea

Discover the ultimate La Manga retreat. Nestled at the top of a premier coastal building, Penthouse Puerto Mar blends luxury with panoramic views of the Mar Menor and Mediterranean.

  • ► The Space: 3 bright bedrooms, each with direct balcony access and 2 full bathrooms.
  • ► The Highlight: An exclusive 70m² rooftop sky-terrace.
  • ► The Lifestyle: Private BBQ, sun-soaking loungers, and alfresco dining in a space that is entirely your own.

Your private Mediterranean escape starts here.

▸ All rates cover the full penthouse for up to 6 guests, including private garage and 70m² Sky Terrace.

▸ Extended stay & Digital Nomad monthly rates available Nov–Apr — contact us for a personalised quote.

Reservations

Request
your stay

Fill in your preferred dates and I’ll get back to you within 24 hours to confirm availability and send over the rental contract.

Enjoy Penthouse Puerto Mar any time of year.

  • July & August: Weekly Escapes (7-night minimum stay).
  • May – June & September – October: Coastal Reset (3-night minimum stay).
  • November through April: Extended stays & Digital Nomad specials. Contact us for discounted monthly rates.
📋 How it works: Submit your dates → I confirm availability → You receive the contract → We agree terms → Your stay is confirmed.
